programs.title: Misfit Garage 2
programs.sub_title: Muddy revenge on the Willys Jeep
programs.desc: The team of mechanics from Fired-Up Garage takes on new challenges.In the meantime, they also have to face completely different problems, such as the theft of tools.Working together gives them a lot of satisfaction.

programs.title: Feds
programs.desc: An insightful look at the FBI through interviews with active employees.Viewers hear about high-profile cases told by agents, informants, undercover agents and even crime victims.

programs.title: Steel Buddies
programs.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programs.title: Kindig Customs
programs.sub_title: Let's leave it to a specialist!

programs.title: Garage Rehab
programs.desc: Richard Rawlings found success running the Gas Monkey Garage and the Gas Monkey Bar and Grill.In the new program, he helps other business owners.He gives them tips on what to do to be as successful as he was.For this purpose, he sets off on a journey across the United States and visits subsequent motorcycle and car repair shops that remain in poor financial condition.Richard and his team will diagnose their problems and tell them what needs to be improved to make their company perform better.
